samples.title: Mutual NDA
samples.subtitle: Acme Robotics · Globex Partners
samples.blurb: Short bilateral NDA. Showcases handling of fields that don't apply to the document type (payment terms, deliverables, kill fee → gray 'not in contract').

samples.title: Fixed-fee SOW
samples.subtitle: Data pipeline migration · USD $42,000
samples.blurb: Statement of Work with detailed payment terms and a kill fee clause. Includes one deliberately-mis-paginated field — verification catches it (amber 'wrong page' chip).

samples.title: Consulting MSA
samples.subtitle: Meridian Health · Atlas Strategic Advisors
samples.blurb: Master Services Agreement framework with hourly billing, IP carve-outs for provider tooling, and a 12-month-look-back liability cap. All extracted fields verify clean.

samples.title: Contributor License Agreement
samples.subtitle: Individual · Open Beacon Foundation
samples.blurb: Open-source CLA. One field includes a deliberately-hallucinated quote so you can see verification catch it (red 'quote not found' chip + page-level warning banner).
